title: Install advisor — standalone Reporter with an anonymous DEMO license, Log10x SaaS
description: A not-signed-in user with no API key installs the standalone Log10x Reporter DaemonSet (log10x/reporter-10x) using an anonymous 14-day demo license, shipping TenXSummary metrics to Log10x SaaS. The wizard mints the demo license itself (no signin). Canonical chain: log10x_discover_env -> log10x_advise_install(app=reporter, backends=['log10x'], license_source='demo'). This is the conversation half of the close-the-loop install e2e (bin/run-install-e2e.mjs --conversational): the same demo license the wizard recommends is the one the engine installs with and the MCP later reads back via /api/v1/demo/*.
prompt: I'm not signed in to Log10x and I don't have an API key. Install the standalone Log10x Reporter on my Kubernetes cluster using an anonymous demo license, and ship the metrics to Log10x SaaS.

initial_tool.reason: Start the install wizard by snapshotting the cluster; the standalone Reporter needs no existing forwarder.

ground_truth.description: advise_install produced a standalone reporter-10x install plan
